 Dear benjamin barber,

 
 
 
 Upgrade to the Amazon Music Unlimited Family Plan at no additional cost for 2 months when you switch from your current subscription.

You and up to five family members can access million of songs – any time, anywhere – on all of your devices. Subscription continues at $21.99/month. Terms and conditions apply.

Current plan subscription fee applies throughout trial. Renews automatically at $21.99/month after.
